title: Quanta (PWR) Stock Rises 30.2% YTD: More Room to Run?
text: More demand for infrastructural solutions, buyouts and solid backlog aids Quanta (PWR). Yet high costs ail.

title: 3 Stocks That Are Poised to Generate Outsized Returns
text: In general, stocks generate outsized returns because the Street has been overly bearish on their outlook. Due to the Street's overdone high interest rate concerns, it's now unduly pessimistic about many growth equities with great futures.

title: Quanta Services, Inc. (PWR) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call November 2, 2023 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Kip Rupp – Vice President-Investor Relations Duke Austin – President and Chief Executive Officer Jayshree Desai – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Michael Dudas – Vertical Research Partners Justin Hauke – Baird Neil Mehta – Goldman Sachs Andy Kaplowitz – Citigroup Marc Bianchi – TD Cowen Steven Fisher – UBS Operator Greetings, and welcome to the Quanta Services Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call. At this time all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Quanta (PWR) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Margin Up, Stock Rises
text: Quanta's (PWR) third-quarter results benefit from strength across its segments.

title: QUANTA SERVICES REPORTS THIRD QUARTER 2023 RESULTS
text: Third  Quarter Consolidated Revenues of $5.62 Billion* Third  Quarter GAAP Diluted EPS of $1.83* and Adjusted Diluted EPS of $2.24* Net Income Attributable to Common Stock of $272.8 Million* and Adjusted EBITDA of $592.5 Million* Cash  Flow From Operations of $406.6 Million* and Strong Free Cash Flow* Remaining Performance Obligations of $13.6 Billion* and Total Backlog of $30.1 Billion* Raising Full-Year 2023 Revenue and Adjusted EBITDA Expectations * = Record quarterly or record third quarter result HOUSTON , Nov. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) today announced results for the three months ended September 30, 2023. Revenues in the third quarter of 2023 were $5.62 billion compared to revenues of $4.46 billion in the third quarter of 2022, and net income attributable to common stock was $272.8 million, or $1.83 per diluted share, in the third quarter of 2023 compared to net income attributable to common stock of $156.0 million, or $1.06 per diluted share, in the third quarter of 2022.
